title: Cohesion Cluster Output
description: Output of the cohesion-cluster skill. Groups ACs by 2-signal transitive clustering on (data_type, screen, integration, lifecycle).

spec_path.description: Absolute path to the analysed spec file.

groups.description: Each group is a candidate subtask boundary if a split is recommended.

label.description: Short human-readable name for the seam, derived from dominant shared signals.

acs.description: AC ids in this group, e.g. ['US-1.1', 'US-1.2', 'US-3.1'] for canonical specs, or ['STORY-1.1', 'STORY-2.1'] when stories are not US-numbered.

shared_signals.description: The signals that joined this group, e.g. ['lifecycle:subscribe', 'integration:AsyncRetryPolicy'].
